LibraryEntry.AttachmentDescription:
The rotoclick model system was specially developed for 3D printing in order to allow a thought-out way of use for 3D printed models. Thanks to the special pairing system between the model and the plate, it is easy to attach any model while keeping access to model dims or implant analogues. Once the attachment is connected to the model you can simply use the rotoclick counterplate and enjoy all the advantages of the rotational mechanism.
- Free positioning along model height in X/Y, rotatable along Z.
